curation_notes: Patch commit f731474 adds _validate_non_local_source_contains_relative_paths() and calls it from _validate_source() in mlflow/server/handlers.py. Only one non-test source file was changed. Location derived from the patch diff: the vulnerable function is _validate_source which lacked relative path validation for non-local URIs. Re-curated with improved L2 and L3 hints: L2 now omits function names and describes the vulnerability generically; L3 narrows to model version source validation with protocol-specific context. Vulnerability class path-traversal confirmed from CWE-23 and patch diff.
